title: ClickPrompt
abstract: ClickPrompt automates the heavy lifting in visual content creation — image editing, video production, and rendering. You make the creative calls; it handles the execution.
abstract_zh: 伙伴们！给你们安利个神器——**ClickPrompt**！写作周报时，它帮你一键生成亮点总结，比手动敲字快多了；调Bug时，精准定位问题，简直像是有个代码界的“心灵捕手”在身边。快来试试吧，让工作效率瞬间UP UP！
